TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Ecuador == Takaray sowal Okuwato Kapolongan Kitakit , itiraay i saka'etipan no Ka'amisan no Satimolan Amirika, isaka'amis malafiyaw ato Kolompiya, isakatimol madado'edo ato Piru. Isaka'etipan o Taypinyang Riyar, ira ho 1,000 km ko kato'edaw a Kalapakos-kanatanatal . O Okuwato kitakit misiiked nani Sipanya i 1809 miheca saka 8 folad saka 10 romi'ad, tangso sa a patireng tona kitakit. Mahifalat ko Sifo'ay-Konis no Cikiw tona kitakit, orasaka, pangangan han sanoSipanya a sowal to "Ecuador", pacimil han to "Sifo'ay-Konis no Cikiw a kitakit". patahtahay ho pawli kona kitakit, sa cingangan ho "Pawli Kitakit". O syot tatapangan a tokay o Kito , itiraay i 'apilisan no cilamalay-tokos Picin, o takaraw nani tongroh no riyar ira ko 2,850 laya', o sakatosa ko katakaraw i hekal(o sakakaay ko katakaraw o syoto no o Lapas tokay). O Kalapakos-kanatanatal(Islas Gal谩pagos) ira ko 7976 km虏, 1100 km nani kitakit no Okuwato, o imi no nini a sowal o "Kamaro'an no Rarokoh", caay kao rarokoh aca ko irray itini adihay ho ko masasiromaromaay a kina'orip,masasiwatikay kona pala itini, orasaka, awaay ko nanicowacowaay a 'a'adopen a tayni tona kanatal, o ma'orip itini oyanan to onani to'asan a kinaira, orasak, o pikakinkiwan ni Cars-Lawpo-Taerwon to "Lalengawan no Kina'orip", maparina' i 1859 miheca, o maamaan to a kina'orip, mafalicay a comahad ko tatirengan sanay, patinako han o tamdaw nani fao mafalic a comahad malatamdaw sanay. O mafafelihay to "o kawas ko misanga'ay to maamaan" sanay a sowal konini. Rikisi Do'edoen kono aniniay a nitilidan miso'edac to mihecaan i'ayaw no 3500 miheca. I salawacan no riyar iraay to ko rakrak sanay a niyaro'. 1463 miheca malocecay no Inka-Hontian Kitakit . Tayni to ko Sipanya a tamdaw i Amirika-Karopaw 'ecoen nangra kona kitakit malopalal tono Sipanya, sanoyanan sato makowan no Sipanya to cisafaw ko cecay so'ot ko mihecaan. I 1809 miheca saka 8 folad saka 10 romi'ad misiiked nani Sipanya patireng to Okuwato. I 1822 miheca laheci sato ko pisiiked. 1825 miheca mikapot to Tata'angay-Kolompiya Kapolongan kitakit, nikawrira, i 1830 miheca matekop a malahedaw kona Tata'angay-Kolompiya, itini to a malaheci ko kapisiiked no Okuwato kitakit. Yo mapatireng ko kitakit, caay ka pahinaker, o sofitay ato kalotamdaw mala'afas a macacaliw a mikowan tona kitakit kina 19 liyad, itiya to i 1979 miheca o kalotamdaw ko mikowanay misanga' to Tatapangan-Rikec no kitakit, tosa polo' miheca ko pira'oyan tona Tatapangan-Rikec. I 2007 miheca saka 4 folad saka 15 romi'ad midemak to Finawlan-Pitopa. Mipatireng to mamisanga' to Tatapangan-Rikec a lomaocan, misanga' to fa'elohay a atapangan-Rikec no kitakit. 2019 miheca saka 10 folad, palasawaden no sifo ko pipatiyap to kasolin simal mapalowad ko tata'angay a pikangyi mitoker to sifo, pacarcar sato ko sifo malinah nani Kito tayra i sakakaay tokay . Kina'orip O kakarayan itini i,o fa'edetay to romi'ami'ad, macokacok tara tolos nga' sa'emelay ko romi'ad. O kina'orip itini tona kitakita o saka17 ko rayray ipolong no hwkal a kitakit ko kaadihay no masamaanay a kina'orip. Ano o 'ayam aca ko sa'osi ira ko 1,600 ko kasasiiked no 'ayam, ipolong no hekal mahaop ko 15%. Ira ko 16,000 ko kasiiked a kilakilang, ira ho ko 106 kasiiked a milesapay a 'a'adopen, 138 ko ipalaay ato iriyaray ko 'orip a kinaira ato 6,000 kasiiked a 'adipangpang. Saka'orip Isasifo'an ko rayray i "Mamala Cemahaday a Kitakit"(developing country) ko Okuwato, o kinaira no palapalan ira ko kasolin simal, mifoting, kilakilangan ato Tingki no nanom; o sakakaay a losay ira ko pawli, kafi, kokoya ato hana, talacowa adihay ko kasolinsimal ato kaso no pala, nikawrira, can'o'ot to sapikarkar a dafong, o mangta'ay ho a kasolin simal ko nipasadakan a paliwal, o 'eteng no kitakit nani panokayan no itiraay i roma a kitakit a matayal a salwinawina. I 2000 miheca misanoAmirikaen ko payso, cowa ka pihayi ko finawlan tona demak sa paci'eci a mapalasawad ko malatangay no sifo, nikawrira, mapaci'eci to mafalic ko payso tono Amirka Payso. O tatodang a hana no kitakit o "Kohecalay Syuni Lan a hana", o lidep no Antis ko tahapinangan 'ayam no kitakit. Tamdaw O dadahal no sera no Okuwato kitakit ira ko 283,560 km虏, o tamdaw i 2019miheca a sa'osi ira ko 17,240,980 ko tamdaw. Nano mikowanan no Sipanya, orasaka, cilamlam to masamaanay ko 'ilang, o cilamlamay to Yoropa a Yincumin o Mitiso hananay mahaop ko 41%, Indian ira ko 34%, kohecalay tamdaw ira ko 15%, o roma sato ira ho ko nani Afrika a kohetingay tamdaw cilamlam to kohecalay a tamdaw. Matiya to o Latin-Amirika a kitakit, Okuwato kitakit o cilamlamay tono to'asan a pitooran a Tinsikiw ko pitooran. O no sifo a sowal i, ono Sipanya a sowal, o kalosowal no Indian Yincumin i, o Kiciwa-Sowal . Ona Runa Shimi sanay i, Runa sa i, o " tamdaw", simi sa i, o " sowal", o sowal no tamdaw sanay ko imi ona sowal, o nao sowal no Inka-Hontian kitakit, orasaka, o "Inka Sowal" hananay ho a pangangan.
S.PHON: == 蓹师o~u~ua涩~僧o~ur == takaraj so~uwa删 o~uko~u~uwato~u kapo~u删o~u艐an kitakit , itiraaj i saka省蓹tipan no~u ka省amisan no~u satimo~u删an amirika, isaka省amis ma删afijaw ato~u ko~u删o~umpija, isakatimo~u删 ma涩~僧a涩~僧o~u省蓹涩~僧o~u ato~u piro~u~u. isaka省蓹tipan o~u tajpinja艐 rijar, ira 魔o~u *,*** km ko~u kato~u省蓹涩~僧aw a ka删apako~us-kanatanata删 . o~u o~uko~u~uwato~u kitakit misiik蓹涩~僧 nani sipanja i **** mi魔蓹师a saka * fo~u删a涩~僧 saka ** ro~umi省a涩~僧, ta艐so~u sa a patir蓹艐 to~una kitakit. ma魔ifa删at ko~u sifo~u省aj-ko~unis no~u 师ikiw to~una kitakit, o~urasaka, pa艐a艐an 魔an sano~usipanja a so~uwa删 to~u "蓹师o~u~ua涩~僧o~ur", pa师imi删 魔an to~u "sifo~u省aj-ko~unis no~u 师ikiw a kitakit". pata魔ta魔aj 魔o~u paw删i ko~una kitakit, sa 师i艐a艐an 魔o~u "paw删i kitakit". o~u sjo~ut tatapa艐an a to~ukaj o~u kito~u , itiraaj i 省api删isan no~u 师i删ama删aj-to~uko~us pi师in, o~u takaraw nani to~u艐ro~u魔 no~u rijar ira ko~u *,*** 删aja省, o~u sakato~usa ko~u katakaraw i 魔蓹ka删(o~u sakakaaj ko~u katakaraw o~u sjo~uto~u no~u o~u 删apas to~ukaj). o~u ka删apako~us-kanatanata删(is删as *a删*pa*o~us) ira ko~u **** km*, **** km nani kitakit no~u o~uko~u~uwato~u, o~u imi no~u nini a so~uwa删 o~u "kamaro~u省an no~u raro~uko~u魔", 师aaj kao~u raro~uko~u魔 a师a ko~u irraj itini a涩~僧i魔aj 魔o~u ko~u masasiro~umaro~umaaj a kina省o~urip,masasiwatikaj ko~una pa删a itini, o~urasaka, awaaj ko~u nani师o~uwa师o~uwaaj a 省a省a涩~僧o~up蓹n a tajni to~una kanata删, o~u ma省o~urip itini o~ujanan to~u o~unani to~u省asan a kinaira, o~urasak, o~u pikakinkiwan ni 师ars-删awpo~u-ta蓹rwo~un to~u "删a删蓹艐awan no~u kina省o~urip", maparina省 i **** mi魔蓹师a, o~u maamaan to~u a kina省o~urip, mafa删i师aj a 师o~uma魔a涩~僧 ko~u tatir蓹艐an sanaj, patinako~u 魔an o~u tam涩~僧aw nani fao~u mafa删i师 a 师o~uma魔a涩~僧 ma删atam涩~僧aw sanaj. o~u mafaf蓹删i魔aj to~u "o~u kawas ko~u misa艐a省aj to~u maamaan" sanaj a so~uwa删 ko~unini. rikisi 涩~僧o~u省蓹涩~僧o~u蓹n ko~uno~u aniniaj a niti删i涩~僧an miso~u省蓹涩~僧a师 to~u mi魔蓹师aan i省ajaw no~u **** mi魔蓹师a. i sa删awa师an no~u rijar iraaj to~u ko~u rakrak sanaj a nijaro~u省. **** mi魔蓹师a ma删o~u师蓹师aj no~u inka-魔o~untian kitakit . tajni to~u ko~u sipanja a tam涩~僧aw i amirika-karo~upaw 省蓹师o~u蓹n na艐ra ko~una kitakit ma删o~upa删a删 to~uno~u sipanja, sano~ujanan sato~u mako~uwan no~u sipanja to~u 师isafaw ko~u 师蓹师aj so~u省o~ut ko~u mi魔蓹师aan. i **** mi魔蓹师a saka * fo~u删a涩~僧 saka ** ro~umi省a涩~僧 misiik蓹涩~僧 nani sipanja patir蓹艐 to~u o~uko~u~uwato~u. i **** mi魔蓹师a 删a魔蓹师i sato~u ko~u pisiik蓹涩~僧. **** mi魔蓹师a mikapo~ut to~u tata省a艐aj-ko~u删o~umpija kapo~u删o~u艐an kitakit, nikawrira, i **** mi魔蓹师a mat蓹ko~up a ma删a魔蓹涩~僧aw ko~una tata省a艐aj-ko~u删o~umpija, itini to~u a ma删a魔蓹师i ko~u kapisiik蓹涩~僧 no~u o~uko~u~uwato~u kitakit. jo~u mapatir蓹艐 ko~u kitakit, 师aaj ka pa魔inak蓹r, o~u so~ufitaj ato~u ka删o~utam涩~僧aw ma删a省afas a ma师a师a删iw a miko~uwan to~una kitakit kina ** 删ija涩~僧, itija to~u i **** mi魔蓹师a o~u ka删o~utam涩~僧aw ko~u miko~uwanaj misa艐a省 to~u tatapa艐an-rik蓹师 no~u kitakit, to~usa po~u删o~u省 mi魔蓹师a ko~u pira省o~ujan to~una tatapa艐an-rik蓹师. i **** mi魔蓹师a saka * fo~u删a涩~僧 saka ** ro~umi省a涩~僧 mi涩~僧蓹mak to~u finaw删an-pito~upa. mipatir蓹艐 to~u mamisa艐a省 to~u tatapa艐an-rik蓹师 a 删o~umao~u师an, misa艐a省 to~u fa省蓹删o~u魔aj a atapa艐an-rik蓹师 no~u kitakit. **** mi魔蓹师a saka ** fo~u删a涩~僧, pa删asawa涩~僧蓹n no~u sifo~u ko~u pipatijap to~u kaso~u删in sima删 mapa删o~uwa涩~僧 ko~u tata省a艐aj a pika艐ji mito~uk蓹r to~u sifo~u, pa师ar师ar sato~u ko~u sifo~u ma删ina魔 nani kito~u tajra i sakakaaj to~ukaj . kina省o~urip o~u kakarajan itini i,o~u fa省蓹涩~僧蓹taj to~u ro~umi省ami省a涩~僧, ma师o~uka师o~uk tara to~u删o~us 艐a省 sa省蓹m蓹删aj ko~u ro~umi省a涩~僧. o~u kina省o~urip itini to~una kitakita o~u saka** ko~u rajraj ipo~u删o~u艐 no~u 魔wka删 a kitakit ko~u kaa涩~僧i魔aj no~u masamaanaj a kina省o~urip. ano~u o~u 省ajam a师a ko~u sa省o~usi ira ko~u *,*** ko~u kasasiik蓹涩~僧 no~u 省ajam, ipo~u删o~u艐 no~u 魔蓹ka删 ma魔ao~up ko~u **%. ira ko~u **,*** ko~u kasiik蓹涩~僧 a ki删aki删a艐, ira 魔o~u ko~u *** kasiik蓹涩~僧 a mi删蓹sapaj a 省a省a涩~僧o~up蓹n, *** ko~u ipa删aaj ato~u irijaraj ko~u 省o~urip a kinaira ato~u *,*** kasiik蓹涩~僧 a 省a涩~僧ipa艐pa艐. saka省o~urip isasifo~u省an ko~u rajraj i "mama删a 师蓹ma魔a涩~僧aj a kitakit"(涩~僧蓹b~v蓹删o~upi艐 师o~uo~u~untrj) ko~u o~uko~u~uwato~u, o~u kinaira no~u pa删apa删an ira ko~u kaso~u删in sima删, mifo~uti艐, ki删aki删a艐an ato~u ti艐ki no~u nano~um; o~u sakakaaj a 删o~usaj ira ko~u paw删i, kafi, ko~uko~uja ato~u 魔ana, ta删a师o~uwa a涩~僧i魔aj ko~u kaso~u删insima删 ato~u kaso~u no~u pa删a, nikawrira, 师an省o~u省o~ut to~u sapikarkar a 涩~僧afo~u艐, o~u ma艐ta省aj 魔o~u a kaso~u删in sima删 ko~u nipasa涩~僧akan a pa删iwa删, o~u 省蓹t蓹艐 no~u kitakit nani pano~ukajan no~u itiraaj i ro~uma a kitakit a mataja删 a sa删winawina. i **** mi魔蓹师a misano~uamirika蓹n ko~u pajso~u, 师o~uwa ka pi魔aji ko~u finaw删an to~una 涩~僧蓹mak sa pa师i省蓹师i a mapa删asawa涩~僧 ko~u ma删ata艐aj no~u sifo~u, nikawrira, mapa师i省蓹师i to~u mafa删i师 ko~u pajso~u to~uno~u amirka pajso~u. o~u tato~u涩~僧a艐 a 魔ana no~u kitakit o~u "ko~u魔蓹师a删aj sjo~u~uni 删an a 魔ana", o~u 删i涩~僧蓹p no~u antis ko~u ta魔apina艐an 省ajam no~u kitakit. tam涩~僧aw o~u 涩~僧a涩~僧a魔a删 no~u s蓹ra no~u o~uko~u~uwato~u kitakit ira ko~u ***,*** km*, o~u tam涩~僧aw i ****mi魔蓹师a a sa省o~usi ira ko~u **,***,*** ko~u tam涩~僧aw. nano~u miko~uwanan no~u sipanja, o~urasaka, 师i删am删am to~u masamaanaj ko~u 省i删a艐, o~u 师i删am删amaj to~u jo~uro~upa a jin师o~u~umin o~u mitiso~u 魔ananaj ma魔ao~up ko~u **%, in涩~僧ian ira ko~u **%, ko~u魔蓹师a删aj tam涩~僧aw ira ko~u **%, o~u ro~uma sato~u ira 魔o~u ko~u nani afrika a ko~u魔蓹ti艐aj tam涩~僧aw 师i删am删am to~u ko~u魔蓹师a删aj a tam涩~僧aw. matija to~u o~u 删atin-amirika a kitakit, o~uko~u~uwato~u kitakit o~u 师i删am删amaj to~uno~u to~u省asan a pito~uo~uran a tinsikiw ko~u pito~uo~uran. o~u no~u sifo~u a so~uwa删 i, o~uno~u sipanja a so~uwa删, o~u ka删o~uso~uwa删 no~u in涩~僧ian jin师o~u~umin i, o~u ki师iwa-so~uwa删 . o~una ro~u~una s魔imi sanaj i, ro~u~una sa i, o~u " tam涩~僧aw", simi sa i, o~u " so~uwa删", o~u so~uwa删 no~u tam涩~僧aw sanaj ko~u imi o~una so~uwa删, o~u nao~u so~uwa删 no~u inka-魔o~untian kitakit, o~urasaka, o~u "inka so~uwa删" 魔ananaj 魔o~u a pa艐a艐an.
S.FORM: == Ecuador == Takaray sowal Okuwato Kapolongan Kitakit , itiraay i saka'etipan no Ka'amisan no Satimolan Amirika, isaka'amis malafiyaw ato Kolompiya, isakatimol madado'edo ato Piru. Isaka'etipan o Taypinyang Riyar, ira ho 1,000 km ko kato'edaw a Kalapakos-kanatanatal . O Okuwato kitakit misiiked nani Sipanya i 1809 miheca saka 8 folad saka 10 romi'ad, tangso sa a patireng tona kitakit. Mahifalat ko Sifo'ay-Konis no Cikiw tona kitakit, orasaka, pangangan han sanoSipanya a sowal to "Ecuador", pacimil han to "Sifo'ay-Konis no Cikiw a kitakit". patahtahay ho pawli kona kitakit, sa cingangan ho "Pawli Kitakit". O syot tatapangan a tokay o Kito , itiraay i 'apilisan no cilamalay-tokos Picin, o takaraw nani tongroh no riyar ira ko 2,850 laya', o sakatosa ko katakaraw i hekal(o sakakaay ko katakaraw o syoto no o Lapas tokay). O Kalapakos-kanatanatal(Islas Gal谩pagos) ira ko 7976 km虏, 1100 km nani kitakit no Okuwato, o imi no nini a sowal o "Kamaro'an no Rarokoh", caay kao rarokoh aca ko irray itini adihay ho ko masasiromaromaay a kina'orip,masasiwatikay kona pala itini, orasaka, awaay ko nanicowacowaay a 'a'adopen a tayni tona kanatal, o ma'orip itini oyanan to onani to'asan a kinaira, orasak, o pikakinkiwan ni Cars-Lawpo-Taerwon to "Lalengawan no Kina'orip", maparina' i 1859 miheca, o maamaan to a kina'orip, mafalicay a comahad ko tatirengan sanay, patinako han o tamdaw nani fao mafalic a comahad malatamdaw sanay. O mafafelihay to "o kawas ko misanga'ay to maamaan" sanay a sowal konini. Rikisi Do'edoen kono aniniay a nitilidan miso'edac to mihecaan i'ayaw no 3500 miheca. I salawacan no riyar iraay to ko rakrak sanay a niyaro'. 1463 miheca malocecay no Inka-Hontian Kitakit . Tayni to ko Sipanya a tamdaw i Amirika-Karopaw 'ecoen nangra kona kitakit malopalal tono Sipanya, sanoyanan sato makowan no Sipanya to cisafaw ko cecay so'ot ko mihecaan. I 1809 miheca saka 8 folad saka 10 romi'ad misiiked nani Sipanya patireng to Okuwato. I 1822 miheca laheci sato ko pisiiked. 1825 miheca mikapot to Tata'angay-Kolompiya Kapolongan kitakit, nikawrira, i 1830 miheca matekop a malahedaw kona Tata'angay-Kolompiya, itini to a malaheci ko kapisiiked no Okuwato kitakit. Yo mapatireng ko kitakit, caay ka pahinaker, o sofitay ato kalotamdaw mala'afas a macacaliw a mikowan tona kitakit kina 19 liyad, itiya to i 1979 miheca o kalotamdaw ko mikowanay misanga' to Tatapangan-Rikec no kitakit, tosa polo' miheca ko pira'oyan tona Tatapangan-Rikec. I 2007 miheca saka 4 folad saka 15 romi'ad midemak to Finawlan-Pitopa. Mipatireng to mamisanga' to Tatapangan-Rikec a lomaocan, misanga' to fa'elohay a atapangan-Rikec no kitakit. 2019 miheca saka 10 folad, palasawaden no sifo ko pipatiyap to kasolin simal mapalowad ko tata'angay a pikangyi mitoker to sifo, pacarcar sato ko sifo malinah nani Kito tayra i sakakaay tokay . Kina'orip O kakarayan itini i,o fa'edetay to romi'ami'ad, macokacok tara tolos nga' sa'emelay ko romi'ad. O kina'orip itini tona kitakita o saka17 ko rayray ipolong no hwkal a kitakit ko kaadihay no masamaanay a kina'orip. Ano o 'ayam aca ko sa'osi ira ko 1,600 ko kasasiiked no 'ayam, ipolong no hekal mahaop ko 15%. Ira ko 16,000 ko kasiiked a kilakilang, ira ho ko 106 kasiiked a milesapay a 'a'adopen, 138 ko ipalaay ato iriyaray ko 'orip a kinaira ato 6,000 kasiiked a 'adipangpang. Saka'orip Isasifo'an ko rayray i "Mamala Cemahaday a Kitakit"(developing country) ko Okuwato, o kinaira no palapalan ira ko kasolin simal, mifoting, kilakilangan ato Tingki no nanom; o sakakaay a losay ira ko pawli, kafi, kokoya ato hana, talacowa adihay ko kasolinsimal ato kaso no pala, nikawrira, can'o'ot to sapikarkar a dafong, o mangta'ay ho a kasolin simal ko nipasadakan a paliwal, o 'eteng no kitakit nani panokayan no itiraay i roma a kitakit a matayal a salwinawina. I 2000 miheca misanoAmirikaen ko payso, cowa ka pihayi ko finawlan tona demak sa paci'eci a mapalasawad ko malatangay no sifo, nikawrira, mapaci'eci to mafalic ko payso tono Amirka Payso. O tatodang a hana no kitakit o "Kohecalay Syuni Lan a hana", o lidep no Antis ko tahapinangan 'ayam no kitakit. Tamdaw O dadahal no sera no Okuwato kitakit ira ko 283,560 km虏, o tamdaw i 2019miheca a sa'osi ira ko 17,240,980 ko tamdaw. Nano mikowanan no Sipanya, orasaka, cilamlam to masamaanay ko 'ilang, o cilamlamay to Yoropa a Yincumin o Mitiso hananay mahaop ko 41%, Indian ira ko 34%, kohecalay tamdaw ira ko 15%, o roma sato ira ho ko nani Afrika a kohetingay tamdaw cilamlam to kohecalay a tamdaw. Matiya to o Latin-Amirika a kitakit, Okuwato kitakit o cilamlamay tono to'asan a pitooran a Tinsikiw ko pitooran. O no sifo a sowal i, ono Sipanya a sowal, o kalosowal no Indian Yincumin i, o Kiciwa-Sowal . Ona Runa Shimi sanay i, Runa sa i, o " tamdaw", simi sa i, o " sowal", o sowal no tamdaw sanay ko imi ona sowal, o nao sowal no Inka-Hontian kitakit, orasaka, o "Inka Sowal" hananay ho a pangangan.
S.PHON: == 蓹师o~u~ua涩~僧o~ur == takaraj so~uwa删 o~uko~u~uwato~u kapo~u删o~u艐an kitakit , itiraaj i saka省蓹tipan no~u ka省amisan no~u satimo~u删an amirika, isaka省amis ma删afijaw ato~u ko~u删o~umpija, isakatimo~u删 ma涩~僧a涩~僧o~u省蓹涩~僧o~u ato~u piro~u~u. isaka省蓹tipan o~u tajpinja艐 rijar, ira 魔o~u *,*** km ko~u kato~u省蓹涩~僧aw a ka删apako~us-kanatanata删 . o~u o~uko~u~uwato~u kitakit misiik蓹涩~僧 nani sipanja i **** mi魔蓹师a saka * fo~u删a涩~僧 saka ** ro~umi省a涩~僧, ta艐so~u sa a patir蓹艐 to~una kitakit. ma魔ifa删at ko~u sifo~u省aj-ko~unis no~u 师ikiw to~una kitakit, o~urasaka, pa艐a艐an 魔an sano~usipanja a so~uwa删 to~u "蓹师o~u~ua涩~僧o~ur", pa师imi删 魔an to~u "sifo~u省aj-ko~unis no~u 师ikiw a kitakit". pata魔ta魔aj 魔o~u paw删i ko~una kitakit, sa 师i艐a艐an 魔o~u "paw删i kitakit". o~u sjo~ut tatapa艐an a to~ukaj o~u kito~u , itiraaj i 省api删isan no~u 师i删ama删aj-to~uko~us pi师in, o~u takaraw nani to~u艐ro~u魔 no~u rijar ira ko~u *,*** 删aja省, o~u sakato~usa ko~u katakaraw i 魔蓹ka删(o~u sakakaaj ko~u katakaraw o~u sjo~uto~u no~u o~u 删apas to~ukaj). o~u ka删apako~us-kanatanata删(is删as *a删*pa*o~us) ira ko~u **** km*, **** km nani kitakit no~u o~uko~u~uwato~u, o~u imi no~u nini a so~uwa删 o~u "kamaro~u省an no~u raro~uko~u魔", 师aaj kao~u raro~uko~u魔 a师a ko~u irraj itini a涩~僧i魔aj 魔o~u ko~u masasiro~umaro~umaaj a kina省o~urip,masasiwatikaj ko~una pa删a itini, o~urasaka, awaaj ko~u nani师o~uwa师o~uwaaj a 省a省a涩~僧o~up蓹n a tajni to~una kanata删, o~u ma省o~urip itini o~ujanan to~u o~unani to~u省asan a kinaira, o~urasak, o~u pikakinkiwan ni 师ars-删awpo~u-ta蓹rwo~un to~u "删a删蓹艐awan no~u kina省o~urip", maparina省 i **** mi魔蓹师a, o~u maamaan to~u a kina省o~urip, mafa删i师aj a 师o~uma魔a涩~僧 ko~u tatir蓹艐an sanaj, patinako~u 魔an o~u tam涩~僧aw nani fao~u mafa删i师 a 师o~uma魔a涩~僧 ma删atam涩~僧aw sanaj. o~u mafaf蓹删i魔aj to~u "o~u kawas ko~u misa艐a省aj to~u maamaan" sanaj a so~uwa删 ko~unini. rikisi 涩~僧o~u省蓹涩~僧o~u蓹n ko~uno~u aniniaj a niti删i涩~僧an miso~u省蓹涩~僧a师 to~u mi魔蓹师aan i省ajaw no~u **** mi魔蓹师a. i sa删awa师an no~u rijar iraaj to~u ko~u rakrak sanaj a nijaro~u省. **** mi魔蓹师a ma删o~u师蓹师aj no~u inka-魔o~untian kitakit . tajni to~u ko~u sipanja a tam涩~僧aw i amirika-karo~upaw 省蓹师o~u蓹n na艐ra ko~una kitakit ma删o~upa删a删 to~uno~u sipanja, sano~ujanan sato~u mako~uwan no~u sipanja to~u 师isafaw ko~u 师蓹师aj so~u省o~ut ko~u mi魔蓹师aan. i **** mi魔蓹师a saka * fo~u删a涩~僧 saka ** ro~umi省a涩~僧 misiik蓹涩~僧 nani sipanja patir蓹艐 to~u o~uko~u~uwato~u. i **** mi魔蓹师a 删a魔蓹师i sato~u ko~u pisiik蓹涩~僧. **** mi魔蓹师a mikapo~ut to~u tata省a艐aj-ko~u删o~umpija kapo~u删o~u艐an kitakit, nikawrira, i **** mi魔蓹师a mat蓹ko~up a ma删a魔蓹涩~僧aw ko~una tata省a艐aj-ko~u删o~umpija, itini to~u a ma删a魔蓹师i ko~u kapisiik蓹涩~僧 no~u o~uko~u~uwato~u kitakit. jo~u mapatir蓹艐 ko~u kitakit, 师aaj ka pa魔inak蓹r, o~u so~ufitaj ato~u ka删o~utam涩~僧aw ma删a省afas a ma师a师a删iw a miko~uwan to~una kitakit kina ** 删ija涩~僧, itija to~u i **** mi魔蓹师a o~u ka删o~utam涩~僧aw ko~u miko~uwanaj misa艐a省 to~u tatapa艐an-rik蓹师 no~u kitakit, to~usa po~u删o~u省 mi魔蓹师a ko~u pira省o~ujan to~una tatapa艐an-rik蓹师. i **** mi魔蓹师a saka * fo~u删a涩~僧 saka ** ro~umi省a涩~僧 mi涩~僧蓹mak to~u finaw删an-pito~upa. mipatir蓹艐 to~u mamisa艐a省 to~u tatapa艐an-rik蓹师 a 删o~umao~u师an, misa艐a省 to~u fa省蓹删o~u魔aj a atapa艐an-rik蓹师 no~u kitakit. **** mi魔蓹师a saka ** fo~u删a涩~僧, pa删asawa涩~僧蓹n no~u sifo~u ko~u pipatijap to~u kaso~u删in sima删 mapa删o~uwa涩~僧 ko~u tata省a艐aj a pika艐ji mito~uk蓹r to~u sifo~u, pa师ar师ar sato~u ko~u sifo~u ma删ina魔 nani kito~u tajra i sakakaaj to~ukaj . kina省o~urip o~u kakarajan itini i,o~u fa省蓹涩~僧蓹taj to~u ro~umi省ami省a涩~僧, ma师o~uka师o~uk tara to~u删o~us 艐a省 sa省蓹m蓹删aj ko~u ro~umi省a涩~僧. o~u kina省o~urip itini to~una kitakita o~u saka** ko~u rajraj ipo~u删o~u艐 no~u 魔wka删 a kitakit ko~u kaa涩~僧i魔aj no~u masamaanaj a kina省o~urip. ano~u o~u 省ajam a师a ko~u sa省o~usi ira ko~u *,*** ko~u kasasiik蓹涩~僧 no~u 省ajam, ipo~u删o~u艐 no~u 魔蓹ka删 ma魔ao~up ko~u **%. ira ko~u **,*** ko~u kasiik蓹涩~僧 a ki删aki删a艐, ira 魔o~u ko~u *** kasiik蓹涩~僧 a mi删蓹sapaj a 省a省a涩~僧o~up蓹n, *** ko~u ipa删aaj ato~u irijaraj ko~u 省o~urip a kinaira ato~u *,*** kasiik蓹涩~僧 a 省a涩~僧ipa艐pa艐. saka省o~urip isasifo~u省an ko~u rajraj i "mama删a 师蓹ma魔a涩~僧aj a kitakit"(涩~僧蓹b~v蓹删o~upi艐 师o~uo~u~untrj) ko~u o~uko~u~uwato~u, o~u kinaira no~u pa删apa删an ira ko~u kaso~u删in sima删, mifo~uti艐, ki删aki删a艐an ato~u ti艐ki no~u nano~um; o~u sakakaaj a 删o~usaj ira ko~u paw删i, kafi, ko~uko~uja ato~u 魔ana, ta删a师o~uwa a涩~僧i魔aj ko~u kaso~u删insima删 ato~u kaso~u no~u pa删a, nikawrira, 师an省o~u省o~ut to~u sapikarkar a 涩~僧afo~u艐, o~u ma艐ta省aj 魔o~u a kaso~u删in sima删 ko~u nipasa涩~僧akan a pa删iwa删, o~u 省蓹t蓹艐 no~u kitakit nani pano~ukajan no~u itiraaj i ro~uma a kitakit a mataja删 a sa删winawina. i **** mi魔蓹师a misano~uamirika蓹n ko~u pajso~u, 师o~uwa ka pi魔aji ko~u finaw删an to~una 涩~僧蓹mak sa pa师i省蓹师i a mapa删asawa涩~僧 ko~u ma删ata艐aj no~u sifo~u, nikawrira, mapa师i省蓹师i to~u mafa删i师 ko~u pajso~u to~uno~u amirka pajso~u. o~u tato~u涩~僧a艐 a 魔ana no~u kitakit o~u "ko~u魔蓹师a删aj sjo~u~uni 删an a 魔ana", o~u 删i涩~僧蓹p no~u antis ko~u ta魔apina艐an 省ajam no~u kitakit. tam涩~僧aw o~u 涩~僧a涩~僧a魔a删 no~u s蓹ra no~u o~uko~u~uwato~u kitakit ira ko~u ***,*** km*, o~u tam涩~僧aw i ****mi魔蓹师a a sa省o~usi ira ko~u **,***,*** ko~u tam涩~僧aw. nano~u miko~uwanan no~u sipanja, o~urasaka, 师i删am删am to~u masamaanaj ko~u 省i删a艐, o~u 师i删am删amaj to~u jo~uro~upa a jin师o~u~umin o~u mitiso~u 魔ananaj ma魔ao~up ko~u **%, in涩~僧ian ira ko~u **%, ko~u魔蓹师a删aj tam涩~僧aw ira ko~u **%, o~u ro~uma sato~u ira 魔o~u ko~u nani afrika a ko~u魔蓹ti艐aj tam涩~僧aw 师i删am删am to~u ko~u魔蓹师a删aj a tam涩~僧aw. matija to~u o~u 删atin-amirika a kitakit, o~uko~u~uwato~u kitakit o~u 师i删am删amaj to~uno~u to~u省asan a pito~uo~uran a tinsikiw ko~u pito~uo~uran. o~u no~u sifo~u a so~uwa删 i, o~uno~u sipanja a so~uwa删, o~u ka删o~uso~uwa删 no~u in涩~僧ian jin师o~u~umin i, o~u ki师iwa-so~uwa删 . o~una ro~u~una s魔imi sanaj i, ro~u~una sa i, o~u " tam涩~僧aw", simi sa i, o~u " so~uwa删", o~u so~uwa删 no~u tam涩~僧aw sanaj ko~u imi o~una so~uwa删, o~u nao~u so~uwa删 no~u inka-魔o~untian kitakit, o~urasaka, o~u "inka so~uwa删" 魔ananaj 魔o~u a pa艐a艐an.
